title: API latency p99 > 5s on auth-service
description: auth-service p99 latency exceeded 5000ms threshold for 3 consecutive checks. Affected region: us-east-1. Current value: 8200ms.

title: Error rate spike on login endpoint
description: POST /api/v2/auth/login returning 5xx at 34% error rate. Baseline is <0.5%. Started ~14:30 UTC.

title: Customer SSO callback failures elevated
description: SSO callback endpoint returning 502 for enterprise customers using SAML. 12 unique orgs affected in last 15 minutes.

title: auth-service latency recovering
description: auth-service p99 latency now at 1200ms, trending down. Error rate at 2.1%.
